creator: maszeroskia3@scranton.edu
text:
Executing certain command-line scripts that are included in rt-3.8.1_2 results
in a database connection error. Other scripts execute without error. I haven't
been able to determine why this is so.

Broken:

rt-email-dashboards
rt-email-digest

Work:

rt-email-group-admin
rt-clean-sessions
rt-dump-database
rt-shredder
rt-setup-database
rt-test-dependencies

Not-tested:

rt-server

Output of "sudo ./rt-test-dependencies --with-mysql" :

perl:

How-To-Repeat: sudo /usr/local/sbin/rt-email-digest -m daily -p
